about.title: about me
about.description:
I’m a UI designer and frontend developer based in Lodz, Poland.
I design thoughtful, polished interfaces, combining design, usability, and code into cohesive experiences and functional digital products.

services.title: service
services.description:
From concept to final delivery. I design clear interfaces and bring them to life as fully functional websites and applications.
I combine UX, aesthetics, and code to efficiently turn ideas into products that not only look great, but truly work.

services.title: design
services.description:
I can design your brand and its digital experience — from goal analysis, user flows, and information architecture to a useful, cohesive interface.
I create refined visual systems and responsive UI/UX designs tailored to both user needs and business goals.

services.title: code
services.description:
As a frontend developer, I build websites, web apps, mobile apps, and desktop applications.
I create scalable solutions that seamlessly connect visual design, functionality, and brand needs, making the final product cohesive and ready to grow.

educations.title: bio
educations.description:
Graphic design and programming have been my greatest passions for years. After graduating in graphic design, the natural next step for me was to combine design with technology and create interactive interfaces.
This allows me to approach projects more broadly — from aesthetics and visual communication to real, functional implementation that is intuitive, refined, and user-focused.

educations.title: study
description: 2024 — Bachelor’s degree in Computer Graphic Design, Academy of Humanities and Economics in Lodz
2017 — computer science WSINF Łódź - unfinished, I dropped out after a year and started learning programming technologies individually on my own, I am developing these skills to this day.
